Package org.consensusj.jsonrpc

@NullMarked package org.consensusj.jsonrpc
JSON-RPC Java client and supporting classes. See DefaultRpcClient.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.consensusj.jsonrpc.cli
     
    org.consensusj.jsonrpc.daemon
    JSON-RPC Echo Daemon implemented with Micronaut.
    org.consensusj.jsonrpc.groovy
    JSON-RPC Groovy dynamic client and supporting classes.
    org.consensusj.jsonrpc.internal
    Internal.
    org.consensusj.jsonrpc.introspection
    Support classes for GraalVM-compatible build-time introspection.
    org.consensusj.jsonrpc.services
     
  • Class
    Description
    AsyncSupport
    Helper methods for creating asynchronous calls using CompletableFuture.
    AsyncSupport.ThrowingSupplier<T>
    Subinterface of Supplier for Lambdas which throw IOException.
    AsyncSupport.TransientErrorFilter
    Error filter for resilient polling.
    CompositeTrustManager
    A Trust Manager that adds a second trust store (key store) to the default trust store.
    DefaultRpcClient
    A strongly-typed, Jackson-based JSON-RPC client.
    DefaultRpcClient.TransientErrorMapper<T>
    Functional interface for ignoring what are considered "transient" errors.
    DefaultRpcClient.TransportFactory
    Functional interface for creating JsonRpcTransport instances from an ObjectMapper.
    JsonRpcClient<T extends Type>
    JSON-RPC client interface.
    JsonRpcClientHttpUrlConnection
    JSON-RPC Client using HttpURLConnection formerly namedRpcClient.
    JsonRpcClientJavaNet
    Incubating JSON-RPC client using HttpClient
    JsonRpcClientJavaNet.MappingFunction<R>
    Map a response string to a Java object.
    JsonRpcError
    JSON-RPC Error Object POJO
    JsonRpcError.Error
    Predefined JSON-RPC Error Codes.
    JsonRpcErrorException
    Exception wrapper for JsonRpcError Useful in server implementations, throwing an error that will be transmitted to the client.
    JsonRpcException
    JSON RPC Exception
    JsonRpcMessage
    In the future this may be a superclass for JsonRpcRequest and JsonRpcResponse.
    JsonRpcMessage.Version
     
    JsonRpcNotification
     
    JsonRpcRequest
    JSON-RPC Request.
    JsonRpcResponse<RSLT>
    JSON-RPC Response POJO
    JsonRpcService
    Interface for an Asynchronous JSON-RPC Server/Service.
    JsonRpcShutdownService
    Implementations of this interface initiate shutting down the (server) application that is hosting a JsonRpcService.
    JsonRpcShutdownService.NoopShutdownService
    Trivial implementation for simple servers, unit tests, etc.
    JsonRpcStatusException
    JSON-RPC returned HTTP status other than 200 (and unfortunately also sometimes when their is response.error) Additional information is usually in JSON-RPC response TODO: See TODO in parent class JsonRpcException
    JsonRpcTransport<T extends Type>
    Defines the interface for a network-layer implementation of a JSON-RPC client.
